name: Piperade [Master Recipe]
recipeIngredient: 7 pounds peppers, seeded, trimmed, in 1-inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a heavy stock pot over high heat.
2. When the oil is rippling, add onions and sauté, stirring frequently for 2 minutes.
3. Add peppers and jalapenos and continue sautéing, stirring frequently, for another 5 minutes.
4. Stir in 1/4 cup water, cover the pot, and reduce heat to medium-low.
5. Allow the mixture to sweat, stirring occasionally, until the peppers are just tender (about 15-25 minutes).
6. Add salt halfway through the cooking time.
7. Once cooked, season with additional salt and pepper if desired.
8. Let the mixture stand for 10 minutes before serving.
9. Serve warm or hot as a side dish, about 1 cup per person.
10. Refrigerate any remaining piperade for up to 5 days.
